summary: Project with maintenance mode and registered users features. Currently experiencing issues: unable to open maintenance mode and registered users not showing.
known_issues: Unable to open maintenance mode (error reported in v38)
Registered users not showing (reported in v38)

existing_features.title: Fix the maintenance mode toggle in UsersControlsPanel so that calling toggleMaintenanceMode via the admin actor succeeds without throwing an error. Ensure the admin actor is correctly initialized with admin credentials before the toggle call is made, and that the backend toggleMaintenanceMode function authorizes the admin caller properly.

Fix the registered users list in UsersControlsPanel so that getAllUsers (or equivalent) is called via a correctly initialized admin actor with proper permissions, and the list of registered users is successfully fetched and displayed. Ensure the query does not fail with an authorization or initialization error.
